commands.review_summary:
This branch updates embedded agent model-call diagnostics to count delta stream bytes incrementally, omit `partial` snapshots from fallback byte accounting, and add a regression test.

PR surface: Source +30, Tests +45. Total +75 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. source-reproducible: current main JSON-serializes every stream chunk in `observeResponseChunk`, and the local stream contract shows delta events carry a growing `partial` snapshot. I did not run tests in this read-only review, but the failure path is clear from source.
commands.review_followup: - No automated repair is needed; the remaining action is maintainer acceptance of the diagnostic metric semantics plus normal merge checks for a maintainer-labeled PR.

target.title: fix(agents): count streamed model deltas incrementally
target.body:
## Summary
- Count streamed `text_delta`/`thinking_delta`/`toolcall_delta` diagnostics from their incremental `delta` bytes instead of serializing the full event.
- Drop growing `partial` snapshots from fallback stream byte accounting so diagnostics do not repeatedly walk the accumulated assistant message.
- Add regression coverage proving text-delta accounting does not serialize large partial snapshots.

Refs #86599.

## Verification
- `git diff --check origin/main...HEAD`
- `node_modules/.bin/oxfmt --check src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt.model-diagnostic-events.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt.model-diagnostic-events.test.ts`
- `OPENCLAW_VITEST_MAX_WORKERS=1 node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt.model-diagnostic-events.test.ts --reporter=dot` (24 tests passed)
- AWS Crabbox `check:changed`: provider `aws`, lease `cbx_5a9adf174f48`, run `run_2902bf4f01ce`, exit 0

## Real behavior proof
Behavior addressed: dense model streams no longer make model-call diagnostics serialize the full growing `partial` assistant message on every delta.
Real environment tested: AWS Crabbox Linux changed gate plus focused local Vitest wrapper in a Codex worktree.
Exact steps or command run after this patch: `node scripts/crabbox-wrapper.mjs run --timing-json --idle-timeout 60m --ttl 120m --shell -- "pnpm check:changed"`
Evidence after fix: `run_2902bf4f01ce` completed with exit 0 on provider `aws`, lease `cbx_5a9adf174f48`.
Observed result after fix: core/coreTests changed lanes passed, including typecheck, lint, guards, and import-cycle checks.
What was not tested: a live Windows local-model starvation repro; this PR removes the diagnostic quadratic work but does not claim to close every local-provider responsiveness contributor.
